prompt: Clinical planning scene for Xeomin treatment of facial hyperhidrosis.
scene: bright med spa treatment suite with neutral tones
subject: provider in gloves mapping small treatment points along forehead and hairline while patient remains relaxed in treatment chair
composition: wide horizontal frame with patient and provider in three-quarter view, clean space on right
lighting: soft natural clinic light with realistic skin detail
constraints: professional clinical tone; conservative mapping; no blood; no logos; no text; no watermark
negative: heavy glam makeup look; oversaturated skin tones; dramatic effects

prompt: Step 1 of treatment: precision facial zones mapped before injections.
scene: clean treatment room with muted background
subject: close-up of forehead and temple region with subtle marker points indicating planned treatment zones
composition: square frame focused on mapped facial area
constraints: natural appearance; no blood; no bruising; no logos; no text; no watermark
negative: fashion photo styling; heavy retouching; clutter

prompt: Step 2 of treatment: localized Xeomin injections in mapped facial sweating zones.
subject: provider in gloves delivering careful micro-injections at mapped forehead and hairline points with a fine needle
composition: square close-up with needle placement and mapped points visible
constraints: no blood; no distress; conservative medical realism; no logos; no text; no watermark

prompt: Step 3 outcome scene showing improved confidence after facial sweating treatment.
scene: everyday social setting such as a casual coffee meeting
subject: adult patient with calm expression and natural makeup, forehead appearing dry and comfortable during conversation
composition: square mid-shot with gentle depth of field
constraints: no visible sweat beads; no logos; no text; no watermark; understated realism
